memoryArtifacts.headline: Calverley William and Agnes Tempest marriage record in Calverley Charters 1442 pg 251
memoryArtifacts.description:
Charter #348  pg 251
Indenture made between Sir John Tempest, knight, of the one part, and Walter Calverley, esquire, of the other part, being an agreement for the marriage of William Calverley, son and heir apparent of Walter and Agnes Tempest, daughter of Sir John. (before the Pentecost next). It also names Walter's wife as Elisabeth and his father as Sir Walter Calverley, knight. It names William's brothers as Thomas and Robert.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Calverley於大約1425年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親Walter Calverley, Esq.29歲，母親Elizabeth Markenfield26歲。他於1441年1月7日之後與Agnes Tempest在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於從1488年4月12日到1489年7月5日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾卡爾福利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Calverley于大约1425年出生在英国越可爾卡爾福利时，他的父亲Walter Calverley, Esq.29岁，母亲Elizabeth Markenfield26岁。他于1441年1月7日之后与Agnes Tempest在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于从1488年4月12日到1489年7月5日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国越可爾卡爾福利。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Calverley was born about 1425, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Walter Calverley, Esq., was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Markenfield, was 26. He married Agnes Tempest after 7 January 1441, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died from 12 April 1488 to 5 July 1489, in his hometown, and was buried in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Calverley est né environ 1425, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter Calverley, Esq., avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Markenfield, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Tempest après 7 janvier 1441, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé du 12 avril 1488 au 5 juillet 1489, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Januar 1441 in Yorkshire, England Agnes Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb von 12. April 1488 bis 5. Juli 1489 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Calverley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes Tempest dopo il 7 gennaio 1441, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Calverleyが約1425年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Walter Calverley, Esq.は29歳，母Elizabeth Markenfieldは26歳であった。1441年1月7日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAgnes Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はから1488年4月12日まで1489年7月5日に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Calverley(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Calverley, Esq.(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Markenfield(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1441년 1월 7일 이후 영국 요르크실르에서 Agnes Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 4월 12일부터 1489년 7월 5일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Calverley nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Calverley, Esq., tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Markenfield, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Tempest após 7 de janeiro de 1441, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Calverley родился около 1425 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Calverley, Esq. было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Markenfield, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Tempest после 7 январь 1441 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер с 12 апреля 1488 по 5 июля 1489 в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия.
